Block.Para: Second Session, Thirty-ninth Parliament,
56 Elizabeth II, 2007
SENATE OF CANADA
BILL S-206
An Act to amend the Food and Drugs Act (clean drinking water)
first reading, October 17, 2007
THE HONOURABLE SENATOR GRAFSTEIN

Available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca
SUMMARY

This enactment amends the Food and Drugs Act to include water from a community water system as a food that is subject to regulation under the Act. Water systems that serve fewer than 25 persons or that operate less than 30 days a year are excluded.

The Act is amended to allow for the inspection of any place where water destined for human consumption is accumulated or collected or where any activity takes place that promotes the accumulation of such water, thus allowing for the inspection of lands that form part of the watershed. It also allows for the inspection of any place from which contaminants may escape into a drinking water source.
2nd Session, 39th Parliament,
56 Elizabeth II, 2007
senate of canada
BILL S-206
An Act to amend the Food and Drugs Act (clean drinking water)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. (1) The definitions 芒聙聹food芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹sell芒聙聺 in section 2 of the Food and Drugs Act are replaced by the following:

ExplNote.Para: Clause 1: (1) Existing text of the definitions:
芒聙聹food芒聙聺 includes any article manufactured, sold or represented for use as food or drink for human beings, chewing gum, and any ingredient that may be mixed with food for any purpose whatever;
芒聙聹sell芒聙聺 includes offer for sale, expose for sale, have in possession for sale and distribute, whether or not the distribution is made for consideration;

Block.MarginalNote:
芒聙聹food芒聙聺
脗芦 aliment 脗禄
Block.Para: 芒聙聹food芒聙聺 includes any article manufactured, distributed, sold or represented for use as food or drink for human beings, water from a community water system for human consumption, chewing gum, and any ingredient that may be mixed with food for any purpose whatever;

Block.MarginalNote:
芒聙聹sell芒聙聺
脗芦 vente 脗禄
Block.Para: 芒聙聹sell芒聙聺 includes offer for sale, expose for sale, have in possession for sale or distribution, and distribute, whether or not the distribution is made for consideration;
(2) Section 2 of the Act is amended by adding the following in alphabetical order:

Block.MarginalNote:
芒聙聹article芒聙聺
脗芦 article 脗禄

Para.change: 芒聙聹article芒聙聺 includes a gas, liquid or solid that is not packaged;

Block.MarginalNote:
芒聙聹collection芒聙聺
脗芦 collecte 脗禄

Para.change: 芒聙聹collection芒聙聺 includes any activity that causes or promotes the accumulation of a food whether or not it is artificially contained;

Block.MarginalNote:
芒聙聹community water system芒聙聺
脗芦 r脙漏seau de distribution d芒聙聶eau 脗禄

Para.change: 芒聙聹community water system芒聙聺 means a water system that distributes water to 25 or more persons for not less than 30 days in a year;

Block.Para: 2. Section 7 of the Act is replaced by the following:

ExplNote.Para: 7. No person shall manufacture, prepare, preserve, package or store for sale any food under unsanitary conditions.

Block.Para: 7. No person shall collect, manufacture, prepare, preserve, package, distribute or store for sale any food under unsanitary conditions.
3. The portion of subsection 23(1) of the Act before paragraph (a) is replaced by the following:

ExplNote.Para: 23. (1) Subject to subsection (1.1), an inspector may at any reasonable time enter any place where the inspector believes on reasonable grounds any article to which this Act or the regulations apply is manufactured, prepared, preserved, packaged or stored, and may

Block.Para: 23. (1) Subject to subsection (1.1), an inspector may at any reasonable time enter any place where the inspector believes on reasonable grounds any article to which this Act or the regulations apply accumulates, or is collected, manufactured, prepared, preserved, packaged, distributed or stored, or from which any substance may escape and contaminate any food, and may
4. Paragraph 30(1)(e) of the Act is replaced by the following:

ExplNote.Para: 30. (1) The Governor in Council may make regulations for carrying the purposes and provisions of this Act into effect, and, in particular, but without restricting the generality of the foregoing, may make regulations

(e) respecting the method of manufacture, preparation, preserving, packing, storing and testing of any food, drug, cosmetic or device in the interest of, or for the prevention of injury to, the health of the purchaser or consumer;

Block.Para: (e) respecting the method of collection, manufacture, preparation, preserving, packing, distributing, storing and testing of any food, drug, cosmetic or device in the interest of, or for the prevention of injury to, the health of the purchaser or consumer;
Published under authority of the Senate of Canada
脗聞
